MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Julie A. Martucci, Esq. of HASSARD BONNINGON (415-288-9800), appearing for defendant /moving party Paul Turek, M.D.
Plaintiff /opposing party Jennie Chavez (209-247-4911), appearing in pro per

Ruling:
DEFENDANT PAUL TUREK, M.D.'S MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT:
Parties submitted to the Court's ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT PAUL TUREK, MD'S MOTION TO STRIKE portion of the 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT is granted without leave to amend as to the fraud cause of action and the reference to Virginia Rojas. As to Jennie Chavez claim for medical malpractice, the motion is granted. If Ms. Chavez desires to pursue this claim, she should do so by filing a motion seeking leave to amend. It appears from the 3rd amended complaint that there is a basis for her to plead such a claim. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in open court. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/PB)

MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Julie A. Martucci, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Paul Turek, M. D.
No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Defendant Paul Turek's motion to compel further responses to special interrogatories (#1) is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiffs are ordered to serve verified supplemental responses within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $520 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
